Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=400}

Run.Text: All aircraft aboard our carrier require preparation before they can launch. Aircraft will also incur a 'cooldown' time for servicing after landing post-mission. The prep and cooldown times vary between aircraft and between loadouts for each aircraft. Simpler loadouts will prep faster than more advanced loadouts. You can hover over the available loadouts for any given aircraft to see 'Preparation Time' for each loadout.
Use the Time Compression controls at top right to speed up the game while the aircraft preps. Using the arrows, speed up time to 20x.
Note: you can disable prep/cooldown times entirely by going to Options and changing the difficulty setting of 'Flight Deck Timings'!
